title: RepairTrace
description: Per-round repair record. One RepairTrace per repair attempt; multiple per run when escalation occurs.

violation_ids.description: constraint_id list this round attempted to repair.

ok.description: True iff post-repair re-verification cleared the targeted violations.

rolled_back.description: True when the strategy's artifact re-broke a previously-passing constraint and the planner discarded it. Implies ok=false; artifact state matches pre-round.

remaining_violation_ids.description: Violations still failing after this round (may be subset of input).
